name: Unified Century
description:
The intro is inspired to Banagher Links First launch with his unicorn and put your gundam appearance in the chat memory.

I'm conscious about making the definitions public because the whole idea was just expanded by ChatGPT. I feel embarrassed admitting this though because people like these are often looked down but i wanted to know if you guys want to see it so y'all could have some clues about the world.
creator: rhix4u
